examples.cn: 老师让学生把生词抄写五遍。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī ràng xuéshēng bǎ shēngcí chāoxiě wǔ biàn.
examples.en: The teacher asked students to copy the new words five times.

examples.cn: 他抄了同学的作业，被老师发现了。
examples.pinyin: tā chāo le tóngxué de zuòyè, bèi lǎoshī fāxiàn le.
examples.en: He copied his classmate's homework and was caught by the teacher.

examples.cn: 请把你的电话号码抄给我。
examples.pinyin: qǐng bǎ nǐ de diànhuà hàomǎ chāo gěi wǒ.
examples.en: Please copy down your phone number for me.

examples.cn: 别吵了，我们好好谈谈。
examples.pinyin: bié chǎo le, wǒmen hǎohǎo tántan.
examples.en: Stop quarreling, let us have a good talk.

examples.cn: 楼上的邻居装修，吵得我睡不着觉。
examples.pinyin: lóu shàng de línjū zhuāngxiū, chǎo de wǒ shuì bù zháo jiào.
examples.en: The neighbor upstairs is renovating, the noise keeps me from sleeping.

examples.cn: 孩子们在院子里大声吵闹。
examples.pinyin: háizi men zài yuànzi lǐ dàshēng chǎonào.
examples.en: The children are making a lot of noise in the yard.

examples.cn: 老师称赞了他的进步。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī chēngzàn le tā de jìnbù.
examples.en: The teacher praised his progress.

examples.cn: 顾客称赞这家店的服务非常好。
examples.pinyin: gùkè chēngzàn zhè jiā diàn de fúwù fēicháng hǎo.
examples.en: Customers praised the excellent service of this store.

examples.cn: 他的努力得到了大家的称赞。
examples.pinyin: tā de nǔlì dédào le dàjiā de chēngzàn.
examples.en: His efforts received everyone's praise.

examples.cn: 这家公司成立于2005年。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā gōngsī chénglì yú èr líng líng wǔ nián.
examples.en: This company was founded in 2005.

examples.cn: 他们成立了一个研究小组。
examples.pinyin: tāmen chénglì le yī gè yánjiū xiǎozǔ.
examples.en: They established a research group.

examples.cn: 这个理论还需要更多的证据才能成立。
examples.pinyin: zhège lǐlùn hái xūyào gèng duō de zhèngjù cáinéng chénglì.
examples.en: This theory needs more evidence to be established.

examples.cn: 孩子在健康的环境中成长很重要。
examples.pinyin: háizi zài jiànkāng de huánjìng zhōng chéngzhǎng hěn zhòngyào.
examples.en: It is important for children to grow up in a healthy environment.

examples.cn: 这家公司近年来快速成长。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā gōngsī jìn nián lái kuàisù chéngzhǎng.
examples.en: This company has grown rapidly in recent years.

examples.cn: 人生的经历让我们不断成长。
examples.pinyin: rénshēng de jīnglì ràng wǒmen bùduàn chéngzhǎng.
examples.en: Life experiences help us grow continuously.

examples.cn: 每个人都应该承担自己的责任。
examples.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi chéngdān zìjǐ de zérèn.
examples.en: Everyone should bear their own responsibility.

examples.cn: 公司承担了这次事故的全部损失。
examples.pinyin: gōngsī chéngdān le zhè cì shìgù de quánbù sǔnshī.
examples.en: The company bore the full loss of this accident.

examples.cn: 他主动承担起照顾老人的任务。
examples.pinyin: tā zhǔdòng chéngdān qǐ zhàogù lǎorén de rènwù.
examples.en: He took the initiative to bear the task of caring for the elderly.

examples.cn: 他承认了自己的错误。
examples.pinyin: tā chéngrèn le zìjǐ de cuòwù.
examples.en: He admitted his mistake.

examples.cn: 我们必须承认，这是一个巨大的挑战。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen bìxū chéngrèn, zhè shì yī gè jùdà de tiǎozhàn.
examples.en: We must admit that this is a huge challenge.

examples.cn: 他被公认为最优秀的科学家之一。
examples.pinyin: tā bèi gōngrèn wéi zuì yōuxiù de kēxuéjiā zhī yī.
examples.en: He is widely recognized as one of the best scientists.

meaning: to suffer losses; to be at a disadvantage

examples.cn: 做生意有赚有赔，不怕吃亏。
examples.pinyin: zuò shēngyì yǒu zhuàn yǒu péi, bù pà chīkuī.
examples.en: Business has profits and losses, do not be afraid of taking a loss.

examples.cn: 他觉得自己在这次交易中吃了大亏。
examples.pinyin: tā juéde zìjǐ zài zhè cì jiāoyì zhōng chī le dà kuī.
examples.en: He felt he suffered a big loss in this deal.

examples.cn: 老实人在生活中容易吃亏。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshi rén zài shēnghuó zhōng róngyì chīkuī.
examples.en: Honest people tend to end up at a disadvantage in life.

examples.cn: 这场雨持续了一个星期。
examples.pinyin: zhè chǎng yǔ chíxù le yī gè xīngqī.
examples.en: This rain persisted for a week.

examples.cn: 学习需要持续的努力。
examples.pinyin: xuéxí xūyào chíxù de nǔlì.
examples.en: Learning requires continuous effort.

examples.cn: 经济持续增长给人们带来了信心。
examples.pinyin: jīngjì chíxù zēngzhǎng gěi rénmen dàilái le xìnxīn.
examples.en: Sustained economic growth has brought confidence to people.

meaning: to be full of; filled with

examples.cn: 她对未来充满了希望。
examples.pinyin: tā duì wèilái chōngmǎn le xīwàng.
examples.en: She is full of hope for the future.

examples.cn: 房间里充满了花香。
examples.pinyin: fángjiān lǐ chōngmǎn le huā xiāng.
examples.en: The room is filled with the fragrance of flowers.

examples.cn: 这场比赛充满了悬念。
examples.pinyin: zhè chǎng bǐsài chōngmǎn le xuánniàn.
examples.en: This game is full of suspense.

examples.cn: 请重复一遍你的问题。
examples.pinyin: qǐng chóngfù yī biàn nǐ de wèntí.
examples.en: Please repeat your question.

examples.cn: 不要重复犯同样的错误。
examples.pinyin: bùyào chóngfù fàn tóngyàng de cuòwù.
examples.en: Do not repeat the same mistakes.

examples.cn: 他每天重复着同样的生活。
examples.pinyin: tā měitiān chóngfù zhe tóngyàng de shēnghuó.
examples.en: He repeats the same life every day.

examples.cn: 他的第一本小说去年出版了。
examples.pinyin: tā de dì yī běn xiǎoshuō qùnián chūbǎn le.
examples.en: His first novel was published last year.

examples.cn: 这家出版社每年出版大量图书。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā chūbǎnshè měinián chūbǎn dàliàng túshū.
examples.en: This publishing house publishes a large number of books every year.

examples.cn: 这篇论文发表在一本国际期刊上。
examples.pinyin: zhè piān lùnwén fābiǎo zài yī běn guójì qīkān shàng.
examples.en: This paper was published in an international journal.

examples.cn: 所有员工都必须出席今天的会议。
examples.pinyin: suǒyǒu yuángōng dōu bìxū chūxí jīntiān de huìyì.
examples.en: All employees must attend today's meeting.

examples.cn: 很多知名人士出席了开幕式。
examples.pinyin: hěn duō zhīmíng rénshì chūxí le kāimùshì.
examples.en: Many famous people attended the opening ceremony.

examples.cn: 他因病未能出席晚宴。
examples.pinyin: tā yīn bìng wèi néng chūxí wǎnyàn.
examples.en: He was unable to attend the dinner due to illness.

examples.cn: 我们会尽快处理你的申请。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen huì jǐnkuài chǔlǐ nǐ de shēnqǐng.
examples.en: We will process your application as soon as possible.

examples.cn: 他善于处理复杂的人际关系。
examples.pinyin: tā shànyú chǔlǐ fùzá de rénjì guānxi.
examples.en: He is good at handling complex interpersonal relationships.

examples.cn: 这个问题需要立即处理。
examples.pinyin: zhège wèntí xūyào lìjí chǔlǐ.
examples.en: This problem needs to be dealt with immediately.

examples.cn: 艺术家的使命是创造美。
examples.pinyin: yìshùjiā de shǐmìng shì chuàngzào měi.
examples.en: The mission of artists is to create beauty.

examples.cn: 科技创造了更便利的生活。
examples.pinyin: kējì chuàngzào le gèng biànlì de shēnghuó.
examples.en: Technology has created a more convenient life.

examples.cn: 我们要努力创造更美好的未来。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yào nǔlì chuàngzào gèng měihǎo de wèilái.
examples.en: We must strive to create a better future.

examples.cn: 贸易促进了各国的经济发展。
examples.pinyin: màoyì cùjìn le gè guó de jīngjì fāzhǎn.
examples.en: Trade has promoted the economic development of all countries.

examples.cn: 体育锻炼促进身体健康。
examples.pinyin: tǐyù duànliàn cùjìn shēntǐ jiànkāng.
examples.en: Physical exercise promotes good health.

examples.cn: 两国领导人会面，促进了双方合作。
examples.pinyin: liǎng guó lǐngdǎorén huìmiàn, cùjìn le shuāngfāng hézuò.
examples.en: The meeting of the two leaders promoted bilateral cooperation.

examples.cn: 这个问题一直存在，但没有人注意到。
examples.pinyin: zhège wèntí yīzhí cúnzài, dàn méiyǒu rén zhùyì dào.
examples.en: This problem has always existed, but no one noticed it.

examples.cn: 我们之间存在着严重的分歧。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zhī jiān cúnzài zhe yánzhòng de fēnqí.
examples.en: There are serious differences between us.

examples.cn: 目前还存在很多不确定因素。
examples.pinyin: mùqián hái cúnzài hěn duō bù quèdìng yīnsù.
examples.en: There are still many uncertain factors at present.

examples.cn: 他答应帮我完成这个项目。
examples.pinyin: tā dāying bāng wǒ wánchéng zhège xiàngmù.
examples.en: He agreed to help me complete this project.

examples.cn: 既然答应了，就一定要做到。
examples.pinyin: jìrán dāying le, jiù yīdìng yào zuò dào.
examples.en: Since you promised, you must follow through.

examples.cn: 她终于答应了我们的邀请。
examples.pinyin: tā zhōngyú dāying le wǒmen de yāoqǐng.
examples.en: She finally accepted our invitation.

examples.cn: 他的中文水平已经达到了高级。
examples.pinyin: tā de zhōngwén shuǐpíng yǐjīng dádào le gāojí.
examples.en: His Chinese level has already reached advanced.

examples.cn: 公司的年度目标已经提前达到。
examples.pinyin: gōngsī de niándù mùbiāo yǐjīng tíqián dádào.
examples.en: The company's annual goal has been achieved ahead of schedule.

examples.cn: 这座山海拔达到三千多米。
examples.pinyin: zhè zuò shān hǎibá dádào sān qiān duō mǐ.
examples.en: This mountain reaches an altitude of over three thousand meters.

meaning: to deal with people; to have contact with

examples.cn: 我不喜欢和他打交道。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bù xǐhuān hé tā dǎ jiāodào.
examples.en: I do not like dealing with him.

examples.cn: 做销售需要经常和客户打交道。
examples.pinyin: zuò xiāoshòu xūyào jīngcháng hé kèhù dǎ jiāodào.
examples.en: Sales work requires frequent contact with customers.

examples.cn: 他这个人很难打交道。
examples.pinyin: tā zhège rén hěn nán dǎ jiāodào.
examples.en: This person is very difficult to deal with.
